Read Research Get an Audit
Get Started

Let's look at
your numbers.

Tell us about your company. We'll review it and get back to you within 24 hours, in writing. No obligation until you decide to move forward.

No calls. No pitch. No commitment yet.
We review your application, ask any follow-up questions by email, and confirm we're the right fit before you pay anything. If we don't think we can add value, we'll tell you that too, and point you toward the free tools instead.
What happens after you apply
1
We review your application
We look at your company, website, and what you're trying to figure out. Within 24 hours, you'll hear back by email with confirmation or questions.
2
We confirm and invoice
If we're a good fit, we send a short scope confirmation and an invoice. No logins needed, no internal data required. We work from public information.
3
Research starts immediately
Once paid, we start the analysis. The Revenue Leak Audit is delivered in 7 business days. Everything in writing. Every finding in dollars.
4
You get a report you can act on
Not a slide deck. Not a presentation. A written document with every gap identified, every revenue impact quantified, and a prioritized action list.
Application

Takes about 2 minutes. We respond within 24 hours.

We respond within 24 hours. Everything handled in writing.

✓

Got it - we'll be in touch.

Expect a reply within 24 hours at the email you provided. We'll confirm the details and let you know next steps before anything is paid.

Built on Tenth

Revenue intelligence for home service companies. We study how the most profitable HVAC, roofing, and plumbing businesses grow. We share everything we find.
